title: ARCHIVED – Notice – Alberta Flood - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED – Notice – Alberta Flood

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.
Information identified as archived is provided for reference, research or recordkeeping purposes. It is not subject to the Government of Canada Web Standards and has not been altered or updated since it was archived. Please contact us to request a format other than those available.
For the latest update, see Alberta Flood Update
NOTE for Calgary Citizenship Ceremonies: Heritage Park ceremony is still taking place as planned. Okotoks citizenship ceremony is still taking place, but will be held at the Okotoks Recreation Centre. Visit the citizenship ceremony map to see ceremony details.
June 26, 2013 — The CIC Office at the Harry Hays Building (Room 210, 220 4th Avenue South East) is currently closed. Please visit this website for updates.
Scheduled appointments at CIC Calgary were cancelled for June 20, 2013 to June 28. These appointments will be rescheduled on a priority basis once operations are re-opened.
If you have been affected by the flooding and you have questions for CIC please contact: prairies-situation@cic.gc.ca .
If you have general questions about CIC programs and services please visit our online Help Centre .
Subscribe to receive IRCC news
